headline: Murata Collaborates with Synopsys to Provide Simulation Models Through Ansys Electromagnetic and Thermal Analysis Tools
summary: KYOTO, Japan, June 16, 2026--Murata announces users of Synopsys' simulation tools can navigate directly to Murata's website to access and download simulation models from Murata.
